summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Jean Direl personal website. All 9 pytest backend tests passed (health, contact create/list/validation, booking create/list/validation, newsletter subscribe + duplicate 409). Frontend E2E with Playwright: hero loads with EN title, language toggle switches EN<->FR subtitle correctly, all nav links scroll to sections, hero CTA buttons work, projects/experience/skills/services/testimonials sections render with expected item counts, booking form submits successfully (POST 201) with success toast, contact form submits successfully (POST 201) with success toast, mobile menu opens on 390px viewport, footer renders with LinkedIn/GitHub/Email/back-to-top.
action_items: Optional: replace placeholder Calendly URL with real Calendly scheduling link (iframe currently shows 404 for placeholder ID and a postMessage origin warning is logged).
Optional: add real CV PDF files at /cv/Jean_Direl_AI_Engineer_Resume_EN.pdf and FR equivalent (currently 404).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py logger is defined AFTER the route handlers reference it; works because handlers run later, but logger should be configured before app/router creation for cleanliness.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan handler.
Newsletter endpoint has no DB unique index on email; concurrent duplicate posts could both pass the find_one check. Add a unique index on newsletter_subs.email.
Calendly iframe src is a hardcoded placeholder which produces a 404 and a cross-origin postMessage warning; should be moved to env/profile config and gated when empty.
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures create TEST_ prefixed contact/booking/newsletter records in MongoDB via the API. Records are kept (no destructive DELETE endpoints exist) but use TEST_/random-uuid emails for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and produce JUnit at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (https://jean-mlops-labs.preview.emergentagent.com). Toasts use the 'sonner' library — query DOM via [data-sonner-toast]. Language is in localStorage key 'jd_lang'. All interactive elements have data-testid; key ones: language-toggle, hero-book-meeting, hero-download-cv, nav-{about|projects|experience|skills|research|services}-link, mobile-menu-toggle, booking-form/name/email/purpose/submit, contact-form/name/email/message/inquiry-{type}/submit, research-paper-card, research-doi-link, testimonial-0..1, project-card-0..5, service-card-0..5, skill-group-0..7, cert-0..N, experience-item-0..N, site-footer, back-to-top.
